About Dusanto Consultancy Trading OU

Welcome to Dusanto Consultancy Trading OU

 

Welcome to Dusanto Consultancy and Trading. We are providing all kind of consultancy, PMC, Due Dilligence, Financial, Engineering and Technical services focusing on energy Sector. Our Mission is to save the planet and we do our best to focus on customer satisfaction while ensuring the right decision is made for our planet. We provide tailor made solutions for each customer.

Get in touch with us!

Let's discuss your idea. Request a free, non-binding consultation.
